text:
(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates for current county judges of this state that bear the words “County Judge.”

(b) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(15), eff. January 1, 2012.

(c) In this section, “county judge” means the judge of the county court established by Section 15 , Article V, Texas Constitution.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.405 — County Judges

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates for current county judges of this state that bear the words “County Judge.”

(b) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(15), eff. January 1, 2012.

(c) In this section, “county judge” means the judge of the county court established by Section 15 , Article V, Texas Constitution.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 247(15), eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department shall issue specialty license plates for current county judges of this state that bear the words “County Judge.”

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(15), eff. January 1, 2012.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: In this section, “county judge” means the judge of the county court established by Section 15 , Article V, Texas Constitution.
